message:
🐛 Fix nightly E2E pass rate mismatch between widget and card views (#993)

The widget computed pass rate as "guides with latest=success / total guides"
(38%) while the full card used "passed runs / completed runs" (28%). Align
both to use the run-based calculation for consistency with per-guide percentages.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
